Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education (Target 4.3) and fosters critical thinking, analysis, and understanding of diverse historical perspectives (Target 4.7). Model B's original reasoning was more comprehensive, which Model A adopted.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course explicitly focuses on 'colonial integration and differentiation' and 'different legal domains,' directly analyzing historical inequalities and discriminatory policies (Targets 10.2, 10.3). Model B's original analysis was strong and adopted by Model A.
